_note: Familiars (George: wizards & witches). A caster binds ONE familiar that trails them and grants a passive magical benefit — mana_regen (faster mana between casts), mana_max (a deeper well), or sight (see further). `classes` gates who may bind it ('*' = any caster). Read by engine/familiars.

cat.name: a black cat
cat.desc: A witch's cat — all-knowing eyes and idle grace. It steadies the flow of your mana.

owl.name: a horned owl
owl.desc: A silent owl of deep wisdom. It widens the well you draw your magic from.

raven.name: a raven
raven.desc: A sharp-eyed raven that scouts ahead — you see further with it aloft.

toad.name: a warty toad
toad.desc: A phlegmatic toad on your shoulder; its slow, patient pulse feeds your own.

serpent.name: a jade serpent
serpent.desc: A coiling jade serpent, patient and watchful — a little sight, a little power.

imp.name: a chittering imp
imp.desc: A warlock's bound imp, greedy and clever — it feeds your pact its stolen mana.

hare.name: a moon-hare
hare.desc: A silver hare of the wildwood — quick eyes for a quick friend.
